name: Center Rear Closed Loop Cooking Device Index
description: The index of the BLE device tied to the CLC session on this burner. Used to index into the BLE ERD ranges (Device Status: 0x6200-0x6204, Battery Status: 0x6228-0x622C, Hestan Device Status: 0x623C-0x6240). Value undefined when CLC session inactive.
comment: Center Rear Closed Loop Cooking Device Index: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Right Front Closed Loop Cooking Device Index
description: The index of the BLE device tied to the CLC session on this burner. Used to index into the BLE ERD ranges (Device Status: 0x6200-0x6204, Battery Status: 0x6228-0x622C, Hestan Device Status: 0x623C-0x6240). Value undefined when CLC session inactive.
comment: Right Front Closed Loop Cooking Device Index: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Right Rear Closed Loop Cooking Device Index
description: The index of the BLE device tied to the CLC session on this burner. Used to index into the BLE ERD ranges (Device Status: 0x6200-0x6204, Battery Status: 0x6228-0x622C, Hestan Device Status: 0x623C-0x6240). Value undefined when CLC session inactive.
comment: Right Rear Closed Loop Cooking Device Index: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Gas Lockout Valve Status
description: Get valve status from Gas Cooktop.

data.name: Gas Valve Status from Gas Cooktop

comment: Gas Lockout Valve Status: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Lock Gas Valve Request
description: Request Gas Valve to be locked.

values.1: Request Gas Valve to be Locked

options: Request Gas Valve to be Locked
comment: Lock Gas Valve Request: Enum writable select.

name: Modular Cooktops (MCT) System Configuration Status
description: Properties of all the cooktop modules in a MCT system. A system can support up to 7 modules.
comment: Modular Cooktops (MCT) System Configuration Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Modular Cooktops (MCT) System State
description: Overall system state.
comment: Modular Cooktops (MCT) System State: Enum read-only sensor.
